setup-worktree-unix:
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
import os
import sys
from pathlib import Path

root = os.environ.get('ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH', '')
if not root:
    sys.exit('ROOT_WORKTREE_PATH is not set; skipping host-workspace metadata generation')
path = Path('.cursor/host-workspace.json')
path.write_text(
    json.dumps({'host_workspace_root': root}, indent=2) + '\n',
    encoding='utf-8',
)
PY
